Text.Page:
I was stationed at the Advance Camp until a few days ago when our scouts spied gulas massing for an attack outside the camp.

The centurion sent me out to get an urgent message to Tryphena. He told me to wait here and send any reinforcements that arrive back to the camp.

Go down there and help stave off the enemy as long as you can.

All of them? They were all dead?

Are you sure? Of course they are; what am I saying? I just didn't want to believe it. Those were...my friends...down there.

Thank you for trying. Nothing to do now but carry on their mission. Do me a favor and tell {@LinkCreature:209#1005$$Tryphena} at {@Rgn:9011$$Relic Hunter Outpost} that I will maintain my post down here. Someone has to.

Jascus is staying down there? What incredible courage and resolve he must have to witness everything he has and maintain his sanity, let alone a sense of duty.

I'll make sure he gets a medal for this. I just hope it doesn't get awarded posthumously.
